description.content: Real-time and historical foreign exchange rate operations.

Returns the most recent exchange rate data. Rates update hourly on the Free and
Basic tiers, every 10 minutes on Professional, and every 60 seconds on
Professional Plus and Enterprise.

query.description:
Three-letter ISO 4217 base currency code. Defaults to EUR on the Free plan;
any base currency may be selected on Basic plan and above.
Comma-separated list of ISO 4217 currency codes to limit the result set.

response.name: Latest rates anchored to the requested base currency.

Returns end-of-day historical exchange rates for any date since 1999. Historical
data is available on all plans, including Free.

query.description:
Three-letter ISO 4217 base currency code. Defaults to EUR on the Free plan;
any base currency may be selected on Basic plan and above.
Comma-separated list of ISO 4217 currency codes to limit the result set.

variable.description: (Required) ISO-8601 date in `YYYY-MM-DD` format (any working day since 1999-01-04).

response.name: Historical end-of-day rates for the requested date.

On-demand currency amount conversion.

Converts an amount from one currency to another using real-time or historical
rates. Available on Basic plan and above.

query.description: Optional historical date (YYYY-MM-DD) to use for the conversion rate.

response.name: Converted amount and conversion metadata.

Daily historical rates between two dates.

Returns daily historical exchange rates between two dates of your choice,
with a maximum range of 365 days. Available on Professional plan and above.

query.description: (Required) Start date for the time series window (YYYY-MM-DD).
(Required) End date for the time series window (YYYY-MM-DD).

Three-letter ISO 4217 base currency code. Defaults to EUR on the Free plan;
any base currency may be selected on Basic plan and above.
Comma-separated list of ISO 4217 currency codes to limit the result set.

response.name: Map of dates to daily rates for the requested window.

Currency fluctuation analysis between two dates.

Returns fluctuation data (start rate, end rate, change, change_pct) between two
dates for any supported currency pair. Available on Professional Plus and above.

query.description: (Required) Start date for the fluctuation window (YYYY-MM-DD).
(Required) End date for the fluctuation window (YYYY-MM-DD).

Three-letter ISO 4217 base currency code. Defaults to EUR on the Free plan;
any base currency may be selected on Basic plan and above.
Comma-separated list of ISO 4217 currency codes to limit the result set.

response.name: Per-currency fluctuation summary for the requested window.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Fixer is a lightweight JSON API for real-time and historical foreign exchange
rates and currency conversion. Sourced primarily from the European Central Bank
and 15+ other exchange rate data providers, Fixer supports 170+ world currencies.

The API is delivered via the APILayer marketplace. All requests authenticate via
an `apikey` HTTP header. The free tier is limited to 100 requests per month and
is HTTP-only; HTTPS encryption and source-currency switching become available on
the Basic plan and above.
